sentences.arabic: يَتَنَاوَلُ النَّاسُ عَادَةً الْحُمُّصَ وَالْفَلَافِلَ فِي وَجْبَةِ الْإِفْطَارِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi obično jedu humus i falafel za doručak.
sentences.translationEn: People usually eat hummus and falafel for breakfast.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ الْأَطْبَاقُ مَشْهُورَةٌ فِي كَثِيرٍ مِنَ الدُّوَلِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova jela su poznata u mnogim arapskim zemljama.
sentences.translationEn: These dishes are famous in many Arab countries.

sentences.arabic: نُقَدِّمُهَا مَعَ الْخُبْزِ الطَّازَجِ وَبَعْضِ الْخَضْرَاوَاتِ مِثْلِ الطَّمَاطِمِ وَالْخِيَارِ.
sentences.translation: Služimo ih uz svježi hljeb i neko povrće poput paradajza i krastavaca.
sentences.translationEn: We serve them with fresh bread and some vegetables like tomatoes and cucumbers.
